document.title: Point-to-Point Channel
document.summary: Ensures that only one receiver consumes each message. Queue semantics with competing consumers.
document.implementation: Ingestion.Channels.PointToPointChannel wraps NATS JetStream queue groups or Kafka consumer groups.

document.title: Publish-Subscribe Channel
document.summary: Broadcasts a message to all subscribers. Each subscriber gets its own copy.
document.implementation: Ingestion.Channels.PublishSubscribeChannel wraps Kafka fan-out topics or NATS subjects.

document.title: Datatype Channel
document.summary: Each channel carries messages of only one data type. Strongly typed channel routing.
document.implementation: Ingestion.Channels.DatatypeChannel routes messages to type-specific channels based on IntegrationEnvelope.MessageType.

document.title: Invalid Message Channel
document.summary: Messages that cannot be processed are routed to a special channel for investigation.
document.implementation: Ingestion.Channels.InvalidMessageChannel captures malformed or unparseable messages.

document.title: Dead Letter Channel
document.summary: Messages that fail all retry attempts are moved to a dead letter queue for manual intervention.
document.implementation: Processing.DeadLetter with DLQ persistence and Admin.Api DLQ resubmission endpoint.

document.title: Guaranteed Delivery
document.summary: Ensures messages are not lost even if the messaging system fails. Built into Kafka and Temporal durable storage.
document.implementation: Kafka acks=all for producer durability. Temporal workflow persistence for in-flight messages. NATS JetStream file-based storage.

document.title: Channel Adapter
document.summary: Connects an application to the messaging system by translating between the application's API and the messaging infrastructure.
document.implementation: Connectors: Connector.Http, Connector.Sftp, Connector.Email, Connector.File — each implements IConnector.

document.title: Messaging Bridge
document.summary: Connects two messaging systems so they can share messages. Bridges Kafka and NATS JetStream.
document.implementation: Ingestion.Channels.MessagingBridge transfers messages between broker implementations.

document.title: Message Bus
document.summary: A shared messaging infrastructure that all applications use to exchange messages.
document.implementation: The EnterpriseIntegrationPlatform itself IS the message bus — Kafka + NATS JetStream + Temporal as the backbone.
